message: ci: pin Node to 22.11.0 and print version

files.patch:
@@ -19,9 +19,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Setup Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v4
         with:
-          node-version: 22
+          node-version: '22.11.0'
           cache: pnpm
 
+      - name: Node version
+        run: node -v
+
       - name: Install dependencies
         env:
           PNPM_HOME: ~/.pnpm
